name: Bhapi Social
subtitle: Safe Social for Kids
description:
Bhapi Social is the social network built for kids — a fun, creative, and fully protected space where children can connect, share, and express themselves with confidence.

No ads. No strangers. No worries.

YOUR SAFE SPACE TO BE CREATIVE
Post photos, share stories, create AI art, draw, add stickers, and chat with your friends — all in one place designed just for you. Everything you make is yours, and everything you see is age-appropriate.

THREE TIERS, ONE COMMUNITY
Bhapi Social grows with you:
• Explorer (ages 5–9): Simple, visual, playful. Share drawings, stickers, and short voice clips.
• Creator (ages 10–12): Post photos and short videos, join group chats, collaborate on creative projects.
• Trailblazer (ages 13–15): Full social features, public profiles within the Bhapi community, and more creative tools.

SAFE CHATS WITH FRIENDS YOU KNOW
Chat only with friends your parents have approved. No random friend requests. No messages from strangers. Just your actual friends, in a space where you can be yourself.

AI CREATIVE TOOLS
Create things you've never made before. Use AI to generate art from your ideas, co-write stories, design stickers, remix photos, and build animations. Bhapi's creative tools are built to spark imagination, not replace it.

EVERY POST IS SAFE
For Explorers and Creators (under 13), all posts are reviewed before going live. A parent or trusted adult checks your content first — so you never have to worry about sharing something by accident.

PARENTS STAY INFORMED, NOT INVOLVED
Parents see a summary of your activity through the Bhapi Safety app. They know you're safe without reading every message. It's designed to give you freedom while keeping the people who love you in the loop.

NO ADS, EVER
Bhapi Social has no advertising. No sponsored posts. No tracking for marketing purposes. Your feed shows only content from friends and creators your age. What you see is genuinely just for you.

NO IN-APP PURCHASES
Everything in Bhapi Social is included. No coins, gems, or premium unlocks. Creative tools, stickers, and features are all available without spending anything.

CHILDREN'S PRIVACY PROTECTED
Bhapi Social is built from the ground up for children's privacy. We meet COPPA standards for children under 13 and go further for teenagers. Your data is never sold. Your conversations are never read for advertising.

REAL FRIENDS, REAL COMMUNITY
Bhapi Social is not about followers or fame. It's about real friendships and genuine creativity. The community is small, safe, and built around the things kids actually care about.

WHO IS BHAPI SOCIAL FOR?
Children ages 5–15 with a family account in the Bhapi Safety app. Parents set up the account — you make it yours.

Get started with Bhapi Safety (the parent app) to create your family account, then invite your child to Bhapi Social.
keywords: kids social network,safe social media,children app,safe chat for kids,creative kids app,no ads kids,family social network,kids privacy
whats_new: Version 3.0 introduces the Trailblazer tier for ages 13–15, new AI art tools, animated sticker packs, group creative projects, and improved chat features. The Explorer tier now includes voice clip sharing. All new content moderation upgrades for faster post review.
promotional_text: The safe, creative social network for kids 5–15. Chat with friends, create AI art, share stories — with parents informed and no ads, ever.
